summary: Phase 2 Hotel Kiosk Management Testing COMPLETE. Backend: 17/17 API tests passed. Frontend: All 15 features verified. Kiosks page has CRUD, status toggle, filters. Bookings page has summary stats, filters (hotel, status, period), search, sort.

issues: React hydration warnings in console due to <span> elements inside <select>, <option>, <tbody>, <tr> - cosmetic warning from Emergent preview system wrapper elements, does NOT affect functionality

kiosks_list_all.test_kiosks_have_hotel_name: PASS - Each kiosk has hotel_name enrichment

kiosk_create.test_create_kiosk_success: PASS - Creates kiosk linked to hotel, defaults to online

kiosk_delete.test_delete_kiosk_success: PASS - Removes kiosk, verified via GET

bookings_all.test_bookings_have_hotel_name: PASS - Each booking has hotel_name field
bookings_all.test_bookings_have_required_fields: PASS - All fields: id, hotel_id, hotel_name, client_name, pickup/dropoff, ride_date/time, total_price, status
bookings_all.test_bookings_have_valid_status: PASS - Status values: pending, confirmed, assigned, completed, cancelled, refunded

kiosks_manager_page.stat_cards: PASS - Shows Total bornes (4), En ligne (4), Hors ligne (0)
kiosks_manager_page.kiosk_form: PASS - Form with hotel selector, name input, location input, submit button
kiosks_manager_page.filter_hotel: PASS - Hotel filter dropdown works (4 → 1 kiosk)
kiosks_manager_page.kiosk_cards: PASS - 4 cards showing hotel_name, location, ID, install date, status badge
kiosks_manager_page.toggle_status_button: PASS - Toggles kiosk online/offline with toast message
kiosks_manager_page.delete_button: PASS - Delete button visible on each card

hotel_bookings_page.summary_cards: PASS - 4 cards: Resultats filtres (50), CA Total (7,291 EUR), Comm. Hotels (1,069 EUR), Rev. Zont (729 EUR)
hotel_bookings_page.search_input: PASS - Searches by client name ('Client 11' → 3 results) and ID
hotel_bookings_page.sort_toggle: PASS - Toggles between 'Par date' and 'Par prix'
hotel_bookings_page.bookings_table: PASS - Table columns: ID, Hotel, Client, Trajet, Date, Prix, Comm. H., Rev. Zont, Statut
hotel_bookings_page.status_badges: PASS - Shows Terminee (green), Assignee (cyan), Confirmee (blue), En attente (yellow), Annulee (red)

critical_code_review_comments: React hydration warnings appear in console due to Emergent preview system wrapper elements (<span> inside <select>, <tbody>) - these are cosmetic and do NOT affect functionality
All data-testid attributes correctly implemented for testing on kiosks and bookings pages
Commission calculations are mathematically correct on bookings list
Kiosk status toggle updates correctly with proper toast feedback
Filter combinations work correctly (hotel + status + period + search)
seed_data_creation: Used existing seeded demo data: 4 kiosks (3 from seed + 1 test), 50 demo bookings across 3 hotels
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 2 complete. Kiosks Management page (/admin/hotel-kiosks) has: stats (total/online/offline), create form with hotel selector, filters (hotel/status), kiosk cards with toggle status and delete buttons. Hotel Bookings page (/admin/hotel-bookings) has: summary cards (count/CA/comm hotels/rev zont), filters (search/hotel/status/period), sort toggle (date/price), table with all booking info and status badges. 50 demo bookings exist with commission calculations. React hydration warnings in console are from Emergent preview system, not actual bugs.

mocked_api.note: Hotel bookings are DEMO/SEEDED data stored in MongoDB, not connected to real booking system. Commission calculations are done in real-time based on hotel rates.
